# Service Examples

## Minimal Example

```yaml
apiVersion: deck/v1alpha1
id: example-service
kind: Service
spec:
    name: example
```

## Curated Example

```yaml
kind: Service
spec:
  name: containerd
  enabled: true
  state: started
```
